column1: # yahoo_symbol  : REST API symbol AND WebSocket symbol (indices stream directly)
# ws_symbol     : override only for commodity ETF proxies (GLD
#                 Leave blank for equity indices — they stream as-is via Yahoo WS
# source_type   : EQUITY | MCX_GOLD | MCX_SILVER | COMEX_COPPER | COMEX_CRUDE
# unit_XX       : NATIVE = display index value as-is
# ── Commodities — WS v2 streams futures directly (no ETF proxy needed) ────────
# GC=F / SI=F stream on Yahoo WS v2 as USD/oz — converted to local unit in-app
